tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
We don't even talk any more[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
We don't even know what we argue about[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Don't even say "I love you" no more[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Saying how we feel is no longer aloud[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]           [ch]E7[/ch]
Some people work things out and[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D9/F#[/ch]
Some just don't know how to change[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]
Let's don't wait till the water runs dry[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
We might watch our whole lives pass us by[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Let's don't wait till the water runs dry[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Fadd2/G[/ch]
We'll make the biggest mistake of our lives[/tab]

[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Don't do it baby, ooh...[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
 ooh...[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
They can see the tears in our eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
We both deny the pain that lies deep in our hearts[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
Well baby that's a pain we can hide[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Cause everybody knows that we're both torn apart[/tab]


[Bridge 2]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]         [ch]E7[/ch]
Why do we hurt each other?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D9/F#[/ch] 
Why do we push love away?[/tab]


[Chorus]
